title: Visit to National Science Centre, Pragati Maidan
subtitle: An insightful educational visit designed to inspire curiosity and innovation, this trip to the National Science Centre provided participants with hands-on exposure to scientific concepts. It encouraged interactive learning and a deeper appreciation for optics and related fields.
description:
Event: Visit to National Science Centre, Pragati Maidan 
 Objective: The primary objective was to foster a deeper understanding and appreciation of scientific innovation among participants. The event provided a platform for members to explore interactive exhibits and educational demonstrations, enhancing their knowledge in the field of optics and related sciences.
highlights: Focus: Optics and related scientific fields.
